title: AI Provider Configuration
description: Configure which AI/LLM backend powers Abby, the platform's AI assistant. Supports 8 providers including local Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, Moonshot, and Mistral. Only one provider can be active at a time, and all API keys are stored encrypted.
tips: Only one AI provider can be active at a time. Click 'Set as Active' on a provider card to switch the backend that powers Abby.
Use the enable/disable toggle to control which providers are available without removing their configuration.
Ollama runs locally and does not require an API key, only a base URL (default: http://localhost:11434). It ships with MedGemma for clinical use.
API keys are stored encrypted in the database. Use the eye icon to toggle visibility when entering or verifying a key.
Always click 'Test Connection' after configuring a provider to verify that the API key and model are working correctly.
Each provider shows a region badge (US, EU, China, or Local) to help you make data residency decisions for your organization.
The active provider banner at the top of the page shows which provider and model Abby is currently using.
Remember to click Save after changing the model or API key; unsaved changes are indicated by the Save button appearing.
